scope.goal: Map the scheduler record builder and adjacent completion queue/runtime helper family reached from the RuneScape 947 client bootstrap and worker scheduler paths.
scope.relationship_to_previous_milestone: This extends the 0x1407A6630 scheduler state milestone by following its 0x1407A71A0 record-builder calls and the 0x1407A4220 provider mirror predicate, then tying those paths to the 0x1407B6B58 completion queue drain family.

scheduler_record_builder_0x1407a71a0.role: Record initializer and grow-builder for scheduler/work items. It initializes a record rooted at RCX, captures constructor arguments, owns several pointer spans, and installs default static descriptor state.

important_fields.record_plus_0x10: Saved R8 argument; multiplied by RDI when sizing the first backing allocation.
important_fields.record_plus_0x48: Optional backing allocation when the stack-supplied count/pointer is non-zero.
important_fields.record_plus_0x50_to_0x60: Span/vector-style triplet updated with 0x20-byte stride math.
important_fields.record_plus_0x78: Initialized to 1 and later tested through stack state bit 0x4.
important_fields.record_plus_0x98: Embedded/out pointer slot used by the final tail swap.

allocation_and_lifetime_edges: Calls 0x140793B40 repeatedly for record-owned backing allocations, including the first R15-sized backing allocation and later 0x20-stride vector growth.
Calls indirect R10 callbacks through runtime context 0x140E57B40 when replacing old backing pointers.
Calls 0x1407BB160 and 0x1407B9C90 during span/vector copy or growth paths.

The 0x1407A750E final tail allocates a 0x50-byte wrapper when bit 0x4 is set, constructs it through 0x1407B51C4, swaps it through record+0x98, finalizes old pointers through 0x1407B51B0, and then releases storage through thunk 0x1407B8478 -> 0x14002CF10.

constructor_0x1407b51c4.role: Constructs the 0x50-byte wrapper used by the builder final tail.
observed_behavior: Sets object+0x48 to -1 and object+0x4C to 0.
Stores the EDX type/tag at object+0x0; the builder passes EDX=2.

finalizer_0x1407b51b0.role: Wrapper/object finalizer dispatch used on replaced record+0x98 values.
finalizer_0x1407b51b0.observed_behavior: Adds 0x8 to RCX, loads the object's callback/vtable slot +0x20, then jumps through dispatcher/import slot 0x140803060, which resolves in-file to 0x1407F4430.

release_thunk_0x1407b8478_to_0x14002cf10.observed_behavior: 0x1407B8478 is a one-instruction JMP to 0x14002CF10. The real target checks for null, loads runtime context 0x140E57B40, selects the active callback table from +0x108/+0x100 or +0x198, reads vtable slot +0x20, derives R8D from context size/flag slots +0x1A8/+0x1A0 or +0x1F8, and tail-jumps R10 with RDX set to the object pointer.

observed_behavior: Loads TLS via GS:[0x58] and uses offset 0xFC58.
If the TLS slot is zero, calls provider/import slot [0x140802388] and caches EAX in TLS+0xFC58.
important_related_refs: 0x1407A6A54 compares against 0x140E79620 in the previous scheduler signal gate.

helpers.0x1407B636C: Uses LOCK XADD on 0x140C36004; when the prior counter is below 1 it sweeps 0x140C559C0..0x140C55B00 in 0x28-byte steps and calls 0x1407B7BA0 for each slot.
helpers.0x1407B63A8: Reads a signed index from [RCX], rejects <=0 through 0x1407D3730, maps indexes below 8 to 0x140C559C0 + index*0x28, then calls 0x1407B7BC0.
helpers.0x1407B63DC: Loads default slot 0x140C55A60 and jumps to 0x1407B7BB8.
helpers.0x1407B63E8: Loads default slot 0x140C55A60 and jumps to 0x1407B7BC0.
helpers.0x1407B6B58: Previously mapped queue drain path that walks the 0x140C55B00 list/root, uses 0x1407B5A84 and 0x1407B63DC, releases elements through 0x1407B5260, finalizes with 0x1407B5BF8, then tails to 0x1407B63E8.

completion_queue_and_slot_family.qword_read_note: 0x140C55A60 and 0x140C55B00 are virtual-only .data addresses in this file image, so pe-read-qwords records warnings for those reads while address references remain valid.

completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B5200: Tiny reference/state increment helper for object field +0x4C.
completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B5260: Release/decrement helper. When +0x4C reaches zero it writes -1 to +0x48, adjusts RCX to object+0x8, and dispatches through the object callback via 0x140803060.
completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B59CC: Generic state/error dispatcher used broadly by runtime helper paths.
completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B5A50: Status wrapper that calls [0x140802728] and maps the result to status bits using NEG/SBB/NOT/AND.
completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B5A84: Provider/backend identity thunk to [0x140802388], matching the provider cache used by 0x1407A4220.
completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B5A8C: Handle/status query wrapper around import slots 0x140802720, 0x1408026B0, and 0x140802728.
completion_handle_wrappers.0x1407B5BF8: Finalizer-style helper matching the object+0x8, vtable+0x18, 0x140803060 dispatch pattern.

observed_behavior: 0x1407B89FC sets EDX=2, ECX=0, R8D=0 and jumps to 0x1407B8994.
0x1407B8994 only performs the heavy path when EDX == 2.
It reads TLS via GS:[0x58], uses guard byte TLS+0x14, sets the guard to 1, then iterates callback table 0x140804EF0..0x140804F98 and dispatches non-null entries through 0x140803060.

decoder_gaps_closed: ADC/SBB ModRM forms for byte and word/dword/qword operands, including SBB EAX, EAX.
Two-operand IMUL 0F AF /r, including IMUL R15, RDI.
F6/F7 group TEST /0 and /1 immediate forms, including TEST [RSP+0x78], 0x4.

next_targets: Trace 0x1407B63F4..0x1407B64B2 callees 0x1407D3770, 0x1407CDB64, 0x1407D3740, 0x1407D37D0, and 0x1407D3E98 to name the slot-table construction path.
Follow 0x140793B40, 0x1407B9C90, and 0x1407BB160 far enough to distinguish allocator, copy, and vector-growth responsibilities.
Connect the provider identity globals 0x140E79620 and 0x140802388 to the earlier bootstrap/login-key and JS5 setup path.
Use the new SETcc/SBB/MOVSXD/IMUL/F6-F7 TEST decoders to re-run stale instruction windows before drawing additional constructor or lifetime conclusions.
